raw_response:
I agree with the final decision but want to add an additional point supporting why option C ("Depend on length of canal") is indeed the best choice:

The length of the canal plays a significant role because longer canals have more complex geometries and require different amounts of MTA compared to shorter ones. Properly accounting for this variation ensures effective sealing without compromising the ability of tissues around the tooth to function normally post-treatment.

Therefore, my answer remains consistent with Option C. Answer Choice: C.
